arguments.text: 75M with cirrhosis. Creatinine 1.9 mg/dL, bilirubin 4.0 mg/dL, INR 1.5. Na 130. No diabetes.

structuredContent.disclaimer: Calculation only. Not medical advice; not a medical device.
structuredContent.note: Advisory extraction only. Values under 'needs_unit'/'unrecognized_units' were NOT added to 'inputs' because Caliper never assumes a unit. Confirm units, then call compute_score. This tool does not compute and does not diagnose.
